seoTitle: Eradu vs Eradu South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Eradu and Eradu South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Eradu vs Eradu South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Eradu and Eradu South.
heading: Eradu vs Eradu South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Eradu, Western Australia and Eradu South, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Eradu has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Eradu South (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Eradu or Eradu South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Eradu has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Eradu South scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Eradu scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Eradu South scores 47/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Eradu or Eradu South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Eradu has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
